title: Zigdig
description:
Fight nonstop in this fast-paced auto shooter where you upgrade instantly without stopping.

Find the relic, repair your ship and extract before time runs out.

⚔️ FIND THE RELIC• Mine ruins and hidden treasure spots to uncover the relic.

• Fight off endless enemies while you search.

• Kill the relic guardian and claim the relic.

⛏️ REPAIR & EXTRACT• Mine wood and ore with your multi-tool to repair your ship.

• Each run can last up to 30 minutes.

• Leave early to secure your relic—or stay longer for higher rewards.

Fail to extract, and the relic is lost.

⚡ SEAMLESS UPGRADES• No menus. No downtime.

• Upgrade instantly on the move and stay in the action at all times

🌍 EXPLORE & PROGRESS• 5 unique levels.

• 20 relics to discover in each.

• Over 25 random events

• Permanent upgrades tied to each level.

🔓 UNLOCK MORE• 80+ unlocks.

• New weapons and upgrades.

• Starting bonuses and quality-of-life improvements.

Tested and playable on Steam Deck
description_short: Fight nonstop in this fast-paced auto shooter where upgrades happen in real time. Find the relic. Gather resources. Extract before time runs out. Risk staying longer for greater rewards.
